query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'leads', COUNT(*) FROM leads
UNION ALL SELECT 'projects', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL SELECT 'equipes', COUNT(*) FROM equipes
UNION ALL SELECT 'metas_globais', COUNT(*) FROM metas_globais
UNION ALL SELECT 'metas', COUNT(*) FROM metas
UNION ALL SELECT 'atividades_diarias', COUNT(*) FROM atividades_diarias
UNION ALL SELECT 'contratos', COUNT(*) FROM contratos
UNION ALL SELECT 'agendamentos', COUNT(*) FROM agendamentos
UNION ALL SELECT 'visitas', COUNT(*) FROM visitas
UNION ALL SELECT 'conquistas', COUNT(*) FROM conquistas
UNION ALL SELECT 'quick_messages', COUNT(*) FROM quick_messages
UNION ALL SELECT 'faq_chatbot', COUNT(*) FROM faq_chatbot
UNION ALL SELECT 'configuracao_pontuacao', COUNT(*) FROM configuracao_pontuacao
UNION ALL SELECT 'webhook_config', COUNT(*) FROM webhook_config;
